name: RideNow Group, Inc.
business: RideNow Group, Inc. operates a powersports dealership group, selling new and pre-owned motorcycles, ATVs, SXS, PWC, and other powersports products, along with parts, apparel, accessories, finance & insurance products, and repair/maintenance services. It ceased vehicle transportation services in December 2025.

exposures.sentence: We believe our powersports business is the largest powersports retail group in the United States offering a wide selection of new and pre-owned motorcycles, all-terrain vehicles (ATV), utility terrain or side-by-side vehicles (SXS), personal watercraft (PWC), and other powersports products.
We source high quality pre-owned inventory online via our proprietary RideNow Cash Offer tool, which allows sourcing of pre-owned units directly from consumers.
We also offer parts, apparel, accessories, finance & insurance products and services, and aftermarket products from a wide range of manufacturers.

catalysts.event: Commence refinancing process for term loan
catalysts.sentence: In addition, our Credit Agreement requires us to commence a refinancing process prior to September 30, 2026 and complete the refinancing on or prior to November 30, 2026, and provides that failure to achieve such milestones will be an event of default under the Credit Agreement.
